60秒任务: 「遇到困难」：目标/困难/建议/复盘；A=抓住逻辑并总结；B=曲解/漏行动项翻车。
目标功能: 目标｜习惯｜困难｜建议｜复盘｜未来重点
场景族: 真实成人生活场景｜公共空间｜工作/学习空间｜家庭空间｜线上场景
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
I’m having trouble with ___.（说明困难）
The hardest part is ___.（定位难点）
I understand the idea, but I can’t use it yet.（区分理解与应用）
I keep making the same mistake.（说明重复错误）
I feel stuck because ___.（说明原因）
Could you explain it another way?（请求换一种讲法）
Can we practice one example together?（请求练习）
Maybe the task is too big right now.（判断任务过大）
Let’s make it easier first.（降低难度）
I need more time to get used to it.（说明适应期）
Don’t worry, this part takes practice.（鼓励）
What helped you before?（回顾经验）
I’ll focus on one problem at a time.（行动策略）
That makes it feel less stressful.（情绪缓解）
I can try again now.（重新行动）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: difficulty, hardest part, mistake, example, practice, task, stress
Verbs: struggle, understand, use, make, explain, practice
Adjectives / Adverbs: hard, stuck, stressful, easier
Time / Place: right now, one at a time, before, again
Chunks: having trouble, same mistake, explain another way, practice together, less stressful
